meaning: [鍐沒 Muzzle Reference Sight,鐐彛鍩哄噯绯荤粺
examples: There's a Mrs Green to see you.
Mrs. Bierce wears thick bifocal lenses.
Mrs. Blount warned me not to interfere.
All week Democrats hammered Mrs Palin for her lack of experience of national or international politics.
"I knew I had to go wherever the people were suffering, " Mrs Klarsfeld said.
